results.alt: A vertical city stretching 40 kilometers into the sky. Hover-suites with panoramic views of neon-drenched skylines, quantum cuisine, and neural-linked entertainment beyond anything imaginable. Neon Megacity IX

Soar above a city of towering brass clockwork spires and coal-fired airships. Dine in sky-parlors suspended by ornate dirigibles, and explore underground markets lit by amber gas lamps. Steampunk Albion
